prompt_text: Write a cover letter for Hiroshi applying for a backend engineer role. Hiroshi has 4 years of experience building REST APIs and scalable services.
response_text:
[Hiroshi's Address]
[City, State ZIP Code]
[Date]

[Recipient's Name]
[Recipient's Title]
[Company Name]
[Company Address]
[City, State ZIP Code]

Dear [Recipient's Name],

I am excited to apply for the Backend Engineer position at [Company Name]. With four years of experience in building scalable services and REST APIs, I am confident that I can make a significant contribution to your team.

Throughout my career, I have developed a strong foundation in software development, with a particular focus on backend engineering. My expertise includes designing and implementing efficient, scalable, and maintainable systems using a variety of programming languages and frameworks. I have a proven track record of delivering high-quality solutions that meet the needs of both business and technical stakeholders.

Some of my key accomplishments include:

- Designing and implementing REST APIs using Node.js, Python, and Java
- Developing and deploying scalable microservices using containerization and orchestration tools like Docker and Kubernetes
- Collaborating with cross-functional teams to identify and prioritize technical requirements
- Ensuring system reliability and performance through thorough testing and monitoring

I am particularly drawn to [Company Name] because of its commitment to [aspect of company's mission or values that resonates with you]. As a seasoned backend engineer, I believe that I can leverage my skills and experience to help drive innovation and growth within the company.

I have attached my resume, which provides more details about my experience and qualifications. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss my application and how I can contribute to [Company Name]'s success.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to meet with you to discuss how I can join your team.

Sincerely,

Hiroshi
